admincheck.not_group: > ❌ This command can only be used in group chats.
admincheck.is_admin: > ✅ User is an administrator in this group.
admincheck.not_admin: > ❌ User is not an administrator in this group.
admincheck.usage: > ❌ Usage: /admincheck <user_jid> or reply to the target's message using /admincheck
admincheck.error: > ❌ An error occurred while checking administrator rights.
ranking.level_up: 🎉 Congratulations! You've reached level {level}! Keep being active! ⭐
language.unsupported: > ❌ Unsupported language: {lang}. Supported languages: fr, en
help.intro:
🆘 **Bot Help**

Use `{prefix}help <command_name>` to get the description of a specific command.

Example: `{prefix}help menu`

To see the full list of commands, use `{prefix}menu`.
help.not_found:
❌ Command "{command}" not found.

Use `{prefix}menu` to see the list of available commands.
welcome.enabled: > ✅ Welcome messages enabled for this group.
welcome.disabled: > ✅ Welcome messages disabled for this group.
welcome.group_only: > ❌ This command can only be used in groups
welcome.set_success: > ✅ Welcome template set for this group.
welcome.view_none: ℹ️ No custom template set. Use {prefix}welcome set <template> to set one.
welcome.reset_success: > ✅ Welcome template reset (back to default message).
goodbye.enabled: > ✅ Goodbye messages enabled for this group.
goodbye.disabled: > ✅ Goodbye messages disabled for this group.
goodbye.set_success: > ✅ Goodbye template set for this group.
goodbye.view_none: ℹ️ No custom template set. Use {prefix}goodbye set <template> to set one.
goodbye.reset_success: > ✅ Goodbye template reset (back to default message).
anti.not_group: > ❌ This command can only be used in groups
anti.not_admin: > ❌ Only administrators can use this command
anti.invalid_number: > ❌ The number of warnings must be a positive number
anti.reset_none: > ❌ No warnings to reset for user @{user}.
anti.enabled_msg:
> ✅ {feature} enabled for this group!
⚠️ Number of warnings before kick: {maxWarnings}
antiforbidden.add_success: > ✅ Word "{word}" added to the forbidden words list.
antiforbidden.add_already_exists: > ⚠️ The word "{word}" is already in the list.
antiforbidden.remove_success: > ✅ Word "{word}" removed from the forbidden words list.
antiforbidden.remove_not_found: > ❌ The word "{word}" is not in the list.
antiforbidden.list_empty: > 📝 No forbidden words configured for this group.
antipromote.enabled_msg: > ✅ Anti-promote enabled for this group. Any promotion will be automatically undone.
antistatut.enabled_msg:

⚠️ Number of warnings before kick: {maxWarnings}
antitransfer.enabled_msg:
> ✅ Anti-transfer enabled for this group!
⚠️ Number of warnings before kick: {maxWarnings}
promote.usage: > ⚠️ Usage: {prefix}promote @user or reply to the user's message to promote.
promote.error_generic: > ❌ Unable to promote user. Check that the bot is an administrator and the target is not the group owner.
demote.usage: > ⚠️ Usage: {prefix}demote @user or reply to the user's message to demote.
demote.error_generic: > ❌ Unable to demote user. Check that the bot is an administrator and the target is not the group owner.
mute.success: > ✅ The group is closed. Only administrators can send messages.
mute.auto_reopen: > ℹ️ The group has been automatically reopened.
mute.error: > ❌ An error occurred while closing the group.
demute.success: > ✅ The group is open. All members can send messages.
demute.error: > ❌ An error occurred while opening the group.
block.owner_only: > 🚫 Only owners can use this command.
block.usage:
> ⚠️ Please mention a user or provide a number.

Example: {prefix}block @user or {prefix}block 1234567890
block.not_found: > ❌ User not found. Check the mention or number.
block.success:
> ✅ User @{user} has been blocked successfully.
They can no longer use bot commands.
block.error: > ❌ An error occurred while blocking the user.
unblock.owner_only: > 🚫 Only owners can use this command.
unblock.usage:
> ⚠️ Please mention a user or provide a number.

Example: {prefix}unblock @user or {prefix}unblock 1234567890
unblock.not_found: > ❌ User not found. Check the mention or number.
unblock.success:
> ✅ User @{user} has been unblocked successfully.
They can now use bot commands.
unblock.error: > ❌ An error occurred while unblocking the user.
tagoffline.no_offline: > ⚠️ No offline members found (or missing data).
tagonline.no_online: > ⚠️ No online members found (or missing data).
autoreact.all_usage: > ⚠️ Usage: autoreact all on | all off
autoreact.unknown: > ⚠️ Unknown subcommand. Use: on | off | all on | all off | status
autovustatut.status:
👀 **Auto-View Status**

📊 **Enabled:** {enabled}
💖 **Auto-like:** {like}

📝 **Commands:**
• {prefix}autovustatut on/off - Enable/Disable
• {prefix}autovustatut on/off like - Enable/Disable like
• {prefix}autovustatut status - Show status
autovustatut.unknown:
> ⚠️ Unknown subcommand. Use:
• {prefix}autovustatut on
• {prefix}autovustatut off
• {prefix}autovustatut on like
• {prefix}autovustatut off like
• {prefix}autovustatut status

autowrite.duration_usage: > ⚠️ Specify a valid duration in seconds. Example: {name} duration 15
autowrite.duration_range: > ❌ Duration must be between 1 and 300 seconds (5 minutes).
autowrite.unknown: > ⚠️ Unknown subcommand. Use: on | off | all on | all off | duration <seconds> | status
autorecord.all_usage: > ⚠️ Usage: autorecord all on | all off
autorecord.duration_usage: > ⚠️ Specify a valid duration in seconds. Example: {name} duration 15
autorecord.duration_range: > ❌ Duration must be between 1 and 300 seconds (5 minutes).
autorecord.unknown: > ⚠️ Unknown subcommand. Use: on | off | all on | all off | duration <seconds> | status

sudo.owner_only: > ❌ Only the bot owner can use this command.

sudo.no_permission: > ❌ This user does not have active sudo permission.

quiz.group_only: ❌ This command can only be used in a group!
quiz.error: ❌ An error occurred while starting the quiz.
ranking.not_group: > 🚫 This command can only be used in a group.

doc.intro: Here is the complete list of available commands with a brief explanation and an example for each:
doc.footer: Use `{prefix}help <command_name>` for more details on a specific command.
anti.warning_link: > ⚠️ Links are forbidden in this group! Warning {count}/{max}.
anti.warning_video: > ⚠️ Videos are forbidden in this group! Warning {count}/{max}.
anti.warning_image: > ⚠️ Images are forbidden in this group! Warning {count}/{max}.
anti.warning_audio: > ⚠️ Audios are forbidden in this group! Warning {count}/{max}.
anti.warning_sticker: > ⚠️ Stickers are forbidden in this group! Warning {count}/{max}.
anti.warning_bot: > ⚠️ Bots are not allowed in this group! Warning {count}/{max}.
anti.warning_tag: > ⚠️ Too many mentions in the message! Warning {count}/{max}.
anti.warning_spam: > ⚠️ Anti-spam activated! Please slow down. Warning {count}/{max}.
anti.warning_transfer: > ⚠️ Forwarded messages are forbidden in this group! Warning {count}/{max}.
anti.warning_status: > ⚠️ Sending group status is not allowed! Warning {count}/{max}.
antipurge.purge_detected: > 🛡️ **Anti-Purge:** Massive kick attempt detected by {user}. The author has been demoted (and potentially kicked).
antipurge.command_blocked: > 🛡️ **Anti-Purge:** Purge command detected and blocked! @{user} has been demoted for malicious purge attempt.
welcome.phrases: Welcome to the group! We don't have cookies, but we have crazies.
Congratulations! You just entered the best group... according to a completely made-up study.
Welcome! You were added because we needed someone to send bad memes to.
Welcome! We hope you signed the anti-seriousness clause.
You just joined the group that crashes NASA when we talk at the same time.
Welcome! Your keyboard is now connected to a coffee machine. Good luck.
Welcome to the group! The first rule: there are no rules. Except this one.
🎉 Congratulations! You've just unlocked access to the most unpredictable group of your life.
🎺 Drum roll... here comes the official new member of the questionable laughter sect!
Welcome! Every member here has survived this group. You can do it too. Maybe.
goodbye.phrases: We hope it's not because of our terrible jokes!
You're leaving us for TikTok, is that it?
Remember: here was better than at your mother-in-law's!
Watch out, the door is low... well, lower than our jokes!
Take a virtual cookie 🍪 with you!
You're leaving? Great, one less mistake in the group.
Thanks for your useless participation. Forever.
You're leaving us? We almost had a moment of silence. But you weren't worth it.
We'll get over it... unlike your ex.
Go ahead, go back to your mom, she's waiting for you with your failures.
You lasted longer than expected. We would have bet on 2 days.
Bye! Now the group's average IQ has increased.
Don't come back, we've already replaced your void with a funnier bot.
Your departure is as memorable as a fart in space.
You're leaving us? Even the Wi-Fi doesn't care.
We're keeping a spot for you in the sore losers' cemetery.
You're leaving? Shame... even Clippy (the Word paperclip) is more useful than you.
You're leaving? Cool. Less noise, more peace.
If you intended to make an impression, you just slid like pigeon poop.
Finally! We can breathe without your ego in the group.
goodbye.message_body:
😢 *SEE YOU LATER* @{username}*! 

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬
👥 {count} brave members remain
💬 {phrase}
▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

PS: We hid your keys under the virtual doormat 🔑

> powered by Vanscode
anti.kick_message: > 🚫 Too many warnings. Kicking from group.

pair.not_on_whatsapp: > ❌ This number is not registered on WhatsApp.

pair.not_owner: > ❌ Only the owner can use this command.

revoke.description: Allows listing deleted messages and recovering them.
revoke.get_usage: Please specify the message number to recover (e.g., !revoke get 1).
revoke.invalid_number: Please provide a valid number from the list (e.g., !revoke get 1).
revoke.not_found: Unable to retrieve the content of this message.
revoke.usage:
Usage:
!revoke list - View recent deleted messages
!revoke get <number> - Recover a message
instances.usage:
Usage:
!instances list - View all instances and their status
!instances stop <number> - Stop an instance
!instances start <number> - Start an instance
!instances logout <number> - Logout an instance and delete its session
instances.logout_success: > ✅ Instance {phone} logged out and session deleted.
clean.description: Allows deleting a specified number of recent messages in the chat.
clean.error: > ❌ An error occurred while deleting messages.
clean.no_messages: > ℹ️ No recent messages found to delete.
clean.limit: > ⚠️ Delete limit reached. Maximum 100 messages at a time.
resetchat.description: Allows deleting/resetting the history of the current conversation.
resetchat.no_messages: > ❌ No messages found in this conversation, cannot delete it.
resetchat.success: > ✅ The conversation has been deleted successfully.
resetchat.error: > ❌ An error occurred while deleting the conversation.
fancy.usage:
> ⚠️ Usage: {prefix}fancy <style_id> <text>

Example: {prefix}fancy 0 Hello
Or reply to a message with: {prefix}fancy <style_id>

Use {prefix}fancy list to see all available styles.
fancy.invalid_style:
> ❌ Invalid style. Use a number between 0 and {max}.

Use {prefix}fancy list to see all available styles.
fancy.style_not_found: > ❌ Style {id} not found. Use a number between 0 and {max}.
